name: mcp-fraudlabspro
description: Fraud Prevention MCP server using FraudLabs Pro API.
long_description: This is a simple Model Context Protocol (MCP) server implementation for FraudLabs Pro API. It will return the validation result for an order or user transaction, and also helps merchant to update the status for the order or user transaction.

tools.name: get_order_result
tools.description: Retrieve an existing order transaction from FraudLabs Pro fraud detection system.

tools.name: feedback_order
tools.description: Update status of a transaction from pending-manual-review to APPROVE, REJECT or REJECT_BLACKLIST.

tools.name: screen_order
tools.description: Screen an order transaction for fraud.

tools.name: get_user_result
tools.description: Retrieve an existing transaction from FraudLabs Pro fraud detection system.

tools.name: screen_user
tools.description: Screen a user transaction (e.g. login, registration) for fraud.

tools.name: feedback_user
tools.description: Update status of a transaction from pending-manual-review to APPROVE, REJECT or REJECT_BLACKLIST.
